creator: larshenrikoern@outlook.dk
text:
Hi

I have recently reinstalled all my ports. And for some time Frescobaldi did just start. But an upgrade to one of py ports ( I think devel/py-qt5-pyqt) Frescobaldi did not start again. After a reinstall of Frescobaldi (from ports) it did again. So I think multiple packages is using the patched file.

To get a proper fix it should be patched for every port using /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/frescobaldi_app/portmidi/__init__.py

Until that is fixed I can just rebuild Frescobaldi to get the program working again

Have a nice day
